summary: Iteration 12: Tested Voice Notes, Weather, and Suppliers features. 17/17 backend tests passed. All frontend flows verified: navigation links, page loads, search/filter, GPS buttons, forecast rendering, supplier cards, voice recorder UI.
critical_code_review_comments: Voice notes audio playback uses JWT token as query param (acceptable limitation of HTML <audio> element); the endpoint correctly validates token and ownership.
Supplier list is a hardcoded static Python list (PLUMBING_SUPPLIERS in server.py) - if suppliers change, code deploy required. Consider moving to config or DB for easier updates.
Weather endpoint hits Open-Meteo synchronously per request with no caching - consider adding short-lived caching to reduce external API load for repeated location queries.
Voice notes store base64 audio directly inside the MongoDB document - for long recordings this will bloat the collection and may hit 16MB doc limit. Consider using GridFS or an object store.
Transcription silently falls back to '[Transcription unavailable]' on Whisper failure with only a log line; UI has no way to retry or surface this error condition to the user.
seed_data_creation: None. Voice notes list was empty for owner account at time of test (matches expected empty-state behavior).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 12 covered Voice Notes (/api/voice-notes GET/POST/DELETE and /audio?t=), Weather (/api/weather with lat/lon OR location name, Open-Meteo, 7-day forecast, plumber-specific alerts for freeze/heat/wind/rain), and Suppliers (/api/suppliers with search + type filter, static list of 12). Frontend pages: VoiceNotesPage (data-testid=voice-notes-page with voice-recorder, start-recording-btn, voice-job-name, stop-save-btn, play-voice-{id}, delete-voice-{id}), WeatherPage (weather-page, weather-location-input, weather-search-btn, weather-gps-btn, current-weather, weather-forecast, weather-alerts), SupplierPage (supplier-page, supplier-search-input, supplier-search-btn, supplier-type-filters, filter-{type}, supplier-card-{i}, supplier-phone-{i}, supplier-website-{i}, find-nearby-btn). Sidebar nav test-ids: nav-voice-notes, nav-weather, nav-suppliers. Voice Notes is tier-gated; Weather and Suppliers are free. Freeze alert only fires when current temp <= 32F, so absence of alerts for Fairbanks during test was weather-dependent, not a bug.

backend_suppliers: GET /api/suppliers returns 12 suppliers with correct schema
backend_voice_notes: GET /api/voice-notes returns empty array for new user (no _id, no audio_data leakage)
frontend: Dashboard content references Voice Notes, Weather, Suppliers tiles
Weather page loads, search by 'New York' renders current-weather + 7-day forecast
Supplier page loads with all 12 supplier cards on mount
Wholesale filter reduces to 6 supplier cards
Supplier cards display phone and website info
Voice Notes page loads for enterprise user (tier-gated) with recorder UI, start button, job-name input, and empty-state message
